### GPT-5.5

- **model_id:** `gpt-5.5`
- **provider:** OpenAI

### Claude Sonnet 4.6

- **model_id:** `claude-sonnet-4-6`
- **provider:** Anthropic
- **release_date:** 2026-04-24
- **context_window:** 200K
- **modalities:** text, image, pdf
- **status:** stable

Same context window as Opus 4.6 with lower latency. Default model for the fast-iteration tier in several Claude-powered products.

### Claude Opus 4.7

- **model_id:** `claude-opus-4-7`
- **provider:** Anthropic
- **release_date:** 2026-04-24
- **context_window:** 1M
- **modalities:** text, image, pdf
- **status:** stable
- **supersedes:** `claude-opus-4-6`

Successor to Opus 4.6. Ships with a 1M-token context variant. Backs the default Claude Code experience.

### Claude Opus 4.6

- **model_id:** `claude-opus-4-6`
- **provider:** Anthropic
- **release_date:** 2026-04-24
- **context_window:** 200K
- **modalities:** text, image, pdf
- **status:** stable

Opus-class model. Model ID follows the `claude-{family}-{major}-{minor}` convention. Also available as the fast-mode backend for Claude Code.
